title: Telco Customer Churn Analysis
description: A Power BI dashboard analyzing customer churn in a telecom company. It highlights churn rate, contract types, payment methods, and customer retention

title: Pizza Sales Dashboard
description: A Power BI dashboard analyzing pizza sales in 2015, highlighting sales trends, customer ordering patterns, peak periods, product performance, and revenue insights

title: Saudi Arabia Used Cars
description: A Power BI dashboard exploring the Saudi used car market (2010–2021), highlighting prices, top cities, leading brands, and key trends such as Toyota’s market dominance

title: Coffee Bean Data Analysis
description: A Power BI dashboard analyzing coffee bean sales in Saudi Arabia (2023–2024), highlighting sales trends, customer behavior, product performance, and discount impact

title: Data Jobs Breakdown
description: A survey of data professionals, with data cleaned in Power Query and insights on salary .Happiness scores: With salary: 4.27 out of 10 ,With work life balance: 5.74 out of 10

title: Mental Health of Remote Worker
description: This Power BI project explores the relationship between remote work, mental health status, and sleep patterns across different countries and genders

title: Actual Sales vs. Target Sales
description: A dashboard comparing actual sales to targets across months, products, and customer segments. It highlights total sales, target percentage, and sales teams contributions

title: Car Sales and Service
description: This project analyzes car dealership sales, focusing on multiple critical areas such as profits, recalls, and customer sentiment using IBM Cognos Analytics.

title: Sales Analytics Dashboard
description: Built an automated, end-to-end BI solution to track global sales and profitability. Engineered a robust star-schema model to resolve 50% of manual reporting bottlenecks and deliver actionable performance insights.

title: Saudi Birth Names Analysis
description: Analysis of 4,000+ birth records using advanced Power Query and DAX. Built a multi-table data model to visualize name frequencies and gender distributions, transforming raw Excel data into interactive demographic insights.

title: Power Bi Design
description: This project analyzes car dealership sales, focusing on multiple critical areas such as profits, recalls, and customer sentiment using IBM Cognos Analytics.

title: Data Cleaning & Standardization
description: Transformed raw data into a reliable, structured model. Used Power Query to clean, standardize, and extract insights, enabling clear visualization of employee performance, monthly targets, and 12-month cumulative trends.
